## Risk Areas

- [ ] Order state
- [ ] Inventory
- [ ] Amount calculation
- [ ] Permission
- [ ] Database migration
- [ ] API compatibility

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data
- [ ] Error codes are clear
- [ ] Logs support troubleshooting
- [ ] Amounts do not use float
- [ ] SQL indexes were considered
- [ ] APIs have authorization boundaries
- [ ] Docs were updated
